summary: Forensic analysis of v1_The Tier List_9.5 (post anti-plagiarism fix) comparing ranking order and argumentative structure against the original script. Evaluates the 'intellectual backbone' plagiarism claim about DP-12 as bulkiness example, 1301 as speed representative, and M4 as #1. Identifies that while rhetoric is now original, the ranking order and narrative role assignment are still copied from the source.
